creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
The following patch implements the idea gerald suggested:

http://people.freebsd.org/~ehaupt/misc/ccache.diff

The script 'ccache-update-links' is executed when the port is
installed. If a user installs an additional compiler after the
installation of ccache he can simply run the script manually.

Another possibilty would be a hook in ports/Mk/bsd.gcc.mk that will run
the script if ccache is installed.

Feedback would be gratefully apreciated.

Emanuel
